top_signals: Iran retaliates for Larijani: cluster warheads on Tel Aviv, 2 killed, IRGC claims 100+ targets hit
Explosive drones hit US Embassy Baghdad — second attack on embassy in days (Reuters/CNBC)
Kent resigns saying war intel 'was a lie' and 'Iran posed no imminent threat' — Senate hearing TODAY
Gabbard testifies before Senate Intel defending Trump's imminent threat determination (The Atlantic/NBC)
IRGC launches combined drone-missile attack on Tel Aviv and central Israel (Fars/Al Jazeera)
Iran projectile near Australian base in UAE — allied nations' forces now targeted (PM Albanese)
All Gulf states intercept fresh overnight barrage — Bahrain, Qatar, UAE, Saudi Arabia (Al Jazeera)
Lebanon: 912 killed, 800K displaced, state 'tipping point' — no ceasefire signals (ABC Australia)
Iran FM Araghchi: assassinations won't topple Tehran's 'strong political structure' (Al Jazeera)
Trump struggles to build Hormuz coalition — Europe rejects warship deployment demands (NYT)

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 22): ZERO de-escalation signals in active war theaters. Iran escalates with cluster warheads. US escalates with bunker busters. Pakistan kills 408 in Kabul. Israel expands Lebanon ops. Putin-Trump call TODAY is wildcard — Ukraine focus, not ME de-escalation. Senate Intel hearing TODAY — narrative inflection, not battlefield inflection.

latest_news.headline: Iran cluster warheads hit Tel Aviv — 2 killed, IRGC claims 100+ targets struck as revenge for Larijani
latest_news.text: IRGC says missiles hit 100+ military/security targets in Israel as revenge for Larijani assassination. 2 killed near Tel Aviv. Iran FM Araghchi: 'Structure does not depend on one individual.' Retaliation wave ongoing.

latest_news.headline: Iran launches explosive drones at US Embassy in Baghdad — sirens triggered, explosion heard
latest_news.text: Second attack on US Embassy Baghdad — explosive drones this time (first was militia rockets). Sirens activated, explosion near diplomatic compound. Iran-backed militias escalating in Iraq.

latest_news.headline: Iran fires projectile near Australian airbase in UAE — no injuries
latest_news.text: Iranian projectile fired near Australian military presence in UAE. PM Albanese confirms no injuries. Geographic expansion of Iranian targeting to include allied nations' assets.

latest_news.headline: Gabbard testifies at Senate Intel: defends Trump's 'imminent threat' determination amid Kent resignation fallout
latest_news.source: NBC News / The Atlantic / The Guardian
latest_news.text: NCTC Director Joe Kent resigned saying Iran 'posed no imminent threat' and war intel 'was a lie.' Gabbard testifying before Senate Intel Committee defending Trump's decision. Political pressure building domestically. Kent compared to Iraq WMD intelligence failure.

latest_news.headline: Bahrain, Qatar, UAE, Saudi Arabia intercept fresh Iranian missile/drone barrage overnight
latest_news.text: All four Gulf states report intercepting Iranian missiles and drones overnight. Continued pattern of Iranian bombardment targeting Gulf infrastructure and US-linked assets.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 22, 09:04 UTC) — War Day 22. RETALIATION WAVE: (1) Iran fires cluster warheads at Tel Aviv for Larijani killing — 2 killed, IRGC claims 100+ targets; (2) Explosive drones hit US Embassy Baghdad again; (3) Projectile near Australian base in UAE — allies now targeted; (4) Gulf states intercept fresh overnight barrage; (5) Senate Intel hearing: Kent resignation ('intel was a lie') is political earthquake, Gabbard testifying. Iran shows no de-escalation after leadership strikes. Oil ~$102.
